_notes.purpose: Illustrative residential property / homeowners-style policy for the hail demo.
_notes.deductible: 2% of coverage ($7,500 on a $375K limit) — common for hail/wind in central US.
_notes.coinsurance: Captured but does not alter calculations in this first demo build.
_notes.premium: Informational only — not used to estimate premium reduction.
_notes.update_path: Replace with actual policy terms or insurer-informed assumptions when available.
